stock_market.summary: Global markets remain in cautious relief mode. Investors are monitoring energy prices near $113/barrel, while focus shifts to end-of-quarter portfolio rebalancing and upcoming inflation data. Asian markets are exhibiting mixed performance as of the late session.

art_market.summary: March 2026 confirms a solid rebound for the art market, with high-end segments leading growth. Auction results in London and Hong Kong have outperformed expectations, showing a clear 'flight to quality' toward established blue-chip artists.

key_metrics.major_events: Robust London/Hong Kong auction performance, 4% global market growth confirmed
